headlines.title: Ontario Wildfire Smoke Moves East
headlines.summary: Canadian wildfires sent plumes of smoke streaming over Ontario, Quebec, and parts of the U.S. Midwest and Northeast.

headlines.title: NASA Uses Subscale Aircraft to Accelerate Flight Innovation
headlines.summary: Testing new aerospace concepts in flight remains one of NASA’s most effective ways to advance knowledge and reduce risk. The Dale Reed Subscale Flight Research Laboratory at NASA’s Armstrong Flight Research Center in Edw
